---
pagetitle: "SfM & MVS: Von Fotos zu präzisen 3D-Modellen"
format: html
---

```{=html}
<script>window.location.replace("./quarto/index.html");</script>
<noscript><meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=./quarto/index.html"></noscript>
```

Weiterleitung zur [Startseite](./quarto/index.html) …
